evidence.source_audit: src/simsoptpp/tracing.cpp:25-554 (6 RHS classes, RK45 DOPRI5 + TOMS748 + 9 stopping criteria); src/simsoptpp/tracing.h:1-158
downstream_consumers: src/simsopt/field/tracing.py (936 LOC; 8 sopp.* call sites + 9 StoppingCriterion subclasses)
evidence.partial_implementation: src/simsopt/jax_core/tracing.py (FieldlineTracingSpec + dopri5_step + bracket_root_jax + trace_fieldline with phi-plane crossings + JAX stopping-criterion dataclasses (Min/MaxR, Min/MaxZ, ToroidalTransit, Iter, Min/MaxToroidalFlux, Levelset) + GuidingCenterTracingSpec + guiding_center_vacuum_rhs + trace_guiding_center with phi-plane crossings + guiding_center_vacuum_boozer_rhs + guiding_center_no_k_boozer_rhs + guiding_center_boozer_rhs + trace_guiding_center_boozer with zeta-plane crossings + non-Levelset stopping criteria (Min/MaxToroidalFlux fire on s=y[0] via is_boozer_state=True dispatch) + FullorbitTracingSpec + fullorbit_vacuum_rhs + trace_fullorbit with phi-plane crossings + stopping criteria + _continuous_angle helper for scalar-angle unwrap on the Boozer route) + src/simsopt/jax_core/surface_classifier.py (make_levelset_classifier / signed_distance_to_cartesian_classifier wrappers over item-13 RegularGridInterpolant3DSpec) + src/simsopt/geo/surface.py (SurfaceClassifier.to_jax_classifier_fn rebuilds the signed-distance grid in JAX at host setup time)
evidence.partial_parity_test: tests/jax_core/test_tracing_jax_item14.py (9 passed; includes raw-B upstream-time fieldline parameterization proof) + tests/jax_core/test_tracing_jax_phi_events.py (7 passed) + tests/jax_core/test_tracing_jax_levelset_events.py (5 passed; CPU/JAX classifier sign parity + JAX while_loop Levelset stop on outside-start + no-stop on inside-start + public compute_fieldlines wrapper smoke + outside-start firing through wrapper + raw sopp.LevelsetStoppingCriterion rejection) + tests/jax_core/test_tracing_jax_guiding_center.py (9 passed; phi-plane and non-Levelset criterion accept tests plus stopped-event-not-live-row proof) + tests/jax_core/test_tracing_jax_fullorbit.py (8 passed; includes full-orbit phi-plane hit recording, JAX stopping-criterion event rows, public trace_particles(mode='full') stopping-event forwarding, and stopped-event-not-live-row proof) + tests/jax_core/test_tracing_jax_fullorbit_events.py (3 passed; helical-motion phi crossings + public-wrapper phi parity vs sopp + JAX MinR stopping criterion termination on 6-state path) + tests/jax_core/test_tracing_jax_gc_boozer.py (6 passed; covers vacuum/no_K/full Boozer-coordinate RHS variants vs sopp.particle_guiding_center_boozer_tracing at the event_time lane gate, plus trace_particles_boozer JAX-wrapper routing and explicit-failure carve-outs on wrong field type / comm) + tests/jax_core/test_tracing_jax_boozer_zeta_events.py (3 passed; mu=0 axis-trace zeta crossing analytic check + trace_particles_boozer JAX route records zeta hits with endpoint parity vs sopp + CPU/JAX MaxToroidalFlux stopping-event row proof) under JAX_PLATFORMS=cpu and SIMSOPT_JAX_TRANSFER_GUARD=disallow; covers dopri5 single-step vs SciPy RK45, fieldline endpoint vs upstream compute_fieldlines on ToroidalField, bracketed-root vs analytic zero, classifier inside/outside smoke, lane step-count ratio, JIT smoke, phi-plane crossing time vs analytic upstream fieldline time, bracketed-bisection event-time accuracy, MinR/MaxR/MinZ/MaxZ/ToroidalTransit/Iter criterion termination with status=-1-i encoding, phi_hits buffer cap behaviour, stopped post-step states excluded from live trajectories, Levelset classifier sign parity with CPU SurfaceClassifier, Levelset stop on JAX while_loop accepted-step crossing, GC vacuum RHS parallel-motion limit, GC trajectory endpoint vs sopp.particle_guiding_center_tracing, full-orbit helical-motion analytic limit in uniform B, full-orbit endpoint vs sopp.particle_fullorbit_tracing, full-orbit kinetic-energy conservation, full-orbit phi-plane/stopping-event buffer semantics, full-orbit MinR criterion firing on 6-state path, GC-Boozer vacuum mu=0 closed-form limit, GC-Boozer {vacuum, no_K, full} endpoint vs sopp.particle_guiding_center_boozer_tracing, GC-Boozer zeta-plane crossing recording, trace_particles_boozer res_zeta_hits parity vs sopp, trace_particles_boozer flux stopping-event rows, trace_particles JAX routing (mode='gc_vac' and mode='full') + NotImplementedError carve-outs (mode='gc', comm)
evidence.oracle_contract: fixed_state_trajectory_events (fieldline RHS + 4-state Cartesian vacuum guiding-centre RHS + 4-state Boozer-coordinate guiding-centre RHS variants {vacuum, no_K, full} + 6-state Cartesian full-orbit Lorentz RHS slices; phi-plane Poincaré crossings + non-Levelset stopping criteria on the Cartesian lanes)
evidence.carve_outs: MinToroidalFluxStoppingCriterion / MaxToroidalFluxStoppingCriterion are accepted on the public API; they are inactive on the Cartesian fieldline + GC drivers (flux-coordinate keeper) and fire on s=y[0] on the Boozer route (is_boozer_state=True dispatch). LevelsetStoppingCriterion is fully wired through the JAX while_loop on the Cartesian fieldline + GC + full-orbit lanes via SurfaceClassifier.to_jax_classifier_fn(): the signed-distance grid is rebuilt at host setup time, wrapped in a RegularGridInterpolant3DSpec, and queried inside trace_fieldline / trace_guiding_center / trace_fullorbit with a status=-1-i exit code matching the upstream res_phi_hits idx convention. Raw sopp.LevelsetStoppingCriterion instances (no Python wrapper) raise NotImplementedError because the grid metadata needed to rebuild a JAX-side interpolant spec is not exposed. Zeta-plane crossings on the Boozer GC route are now wired through the same fixed-shape phi_hits buffer (rows ``[t_hit, idx, s, theta, zeta, v_par]``); the buffer field is named phi_hits on the dataclass for layout-compatibility with the Cartesian-route result and exposed through the public res_zeta_hits return. Phi-plane crossings and non-Levelset stopping criteria are now fully wired through trace_fullorbit (6-state Cartesian full-orbit lane) and surfaced via the public trace_particles(mode='full') route.
evidence.parity_test: tests/jax_core/test_tracing_jax_item14.py (8 tests pass) + tests/jax_core/test_tracing_jax_phi_events.py (7 tests pass; bracketed bisection + MinR/MaxR/MinZ/MaxZ/ToroidalTransit/Iter criteria + buffer cap) + tests/jax_core/test_tracing_jax_levelset_events.py (5 tests pass; Levelset bridge through to_jax_classifier_fn + JAX while_loop dispatch) + tests/jax_core/test_tracing_jax_guiding_center.py (8 tests pass) + tests/jax_core/test_tracing_jax_fullorbit.py (8 tests pass; full-orbit phi/stopping-event rows included) + tests/jax_core/test_tracing_jax_fullorbit_events.py (3 tests pass; helical-motion phi crossings + public-wrapper phi parity vs sopp + JAX MinR stopping criterion termination on 6-state path) + tests/jax_core/test_tracing_jax_gc_boozer.py (6 tests pass; event_time_tracing lane) + tests/jax_core/test_tracing_jax_boozer_zeta_events.py (3 tests pass; mu=0 axis-trace zeta crossing analytic check + trace_particles_boozer JAX route records zeta hits with endpoint parity vs sopp + CPU/JAX MaxToroidalFlux stopping-event row proof)
evidence.kernel_module: src/simsopt/jax_core/tracing.py (DOPRI5 + PI step controller + bracketed bisection event localizer)
evidence.promotion_validation: tests/field/test_tracing_jax_item16.py + tests/geo/test_framedcurve_jax_wrappers_item18.py + tests/geo/test_finitebuild_jax_ssot_item20.py + tests/field/test_boozermagneticfield_jax_item33.py + tests/jax_core/test_tracing_jax_item14.py - all green; consolidated 256 tests pass on touched suites
evidence.scope_boundary: CPU-JAX fixed-state tracing closure. Host-level MPI split/gather is implemented in the public wrappers; no mpiexec multi-rank proof or CUDA proof is claimed. CPU Boozer fields are intentionally rejected under the JAX backend; callers must use BoozerRadialInterpolantJAX.

evidence.closure_evidence: All 6 wrappers (ToroidalField, PoloidalField, MirrorModel, Dommaschk, Reiman, CircularCoil) plus InterpolatedField shipped. 61 tests pass; 40 under SIMSOPT_JAX_TRANSFER_GUARD=disallow. Carlson R_F/R_D elliptic helper unblocks CircularCoil; InterpolatedFieldJAX implements cylindrical->Cartesian, nfp/stellsym folding, skip mask, and out-of-bounds NaN sentinel.

evidence.source_audit: src/simsopt/field/tracing.py (~1098 LOC; 8 sopp.* call sites + 9 StoppingCriterion subclasses)
depends_on_carve_outs: Phi-plane Poincaré crossings on the Cartesian fieldline + GC + full-orbit lanes are now wired through compute_fieldlines, trace_particles (mode='gc_vac'), and trace_particles (mode='full') via the fixed-shape phi_hits buffer; non-Levelset stopping criteria (MinR/MaxR/MinZ/MaxZ/ToroidalTransit/Iteration) are translated to JAX dataclasses via isinstance dispatch and wired through trace_fieldline / trace_guiding_center / trace_fullorbit. MinToroidalFlux/MaxToroidalFlux are accepted at the API boundary; inactive on the Cartesian path (flux-coordinate keeper) and active on the Boozer route (fire on s=y[0]). LevelsetStoppingCriterion is fully wired through the JAX while_loop via SurfaceClassifier.to_jax_classifier_fn(); raw sopp.LevelsetStoppingCriterion instances (no Python wrapper) raise NotImplementedError.

Zeta-plane crossings on the JAX trace_particles_boozer route are now wired through the fixed-shape phi_hits buffer (per-row layout ``[t_hit, idx, s, theta, zeta, v_par]`` matching the upstream res_zeta_hits 6-column row); stopping criteria translated by _translate_stopping_criteria_to_jax fire on the Boozer state with is_boozer_state=True (the flux-coord criteria fire on s, the Cartesian-axis criteria run through the (s, theta, zeta) state).
`comm=` (MPI) raises NotImplementedError; the JAX driver runs single-process

`trace_particles` JAX routing supports mode='gc_vac' (4-state Cartesian vacuum guiding-centre) and mode='full' (6-state Cartesian full-orbit Lorentz); mode='gc' (non-vacuum guiding-centre) still raises explicit NotImplementedError. `trace_particles_boozer` JAX routing supports mode='gc_vac', mode='gc_nok' and mode='gc' (4-state Boozer-coordinate guiding-centre against BoozerRadialInterpolantJAX); CPU BoozerMagneticField field instances raise NotImplementedError under `is_jax_backend()` instead of falling through to the C++ oracle
evidence.kernel_module: src/simsopt/jax_core/tracing.py (item 14: FieldlineTracingSpec + trace_fieldline with phi-plane crossings + GuidingCenterTracingSpec + trace_guiding_center with phi-plane crossings + JAX stopping-criterion dataclasses (Min/MaxR, Min/MaxZ, ToroidalTransit, Iter, Min/MaxToroidalFlux, Levelset) + trace_guiding_center_boozer + FullorbitTracingSpec + trace_fullorbit)
evidence.partial_implementation: compute_fieldlines + trace_particles (mode='gc_vac' and mode='full') + trace_particles_boozer (mode='gc_vac' / 'gc_nok' / 'gc'): when is_jax_backend() is True the wrappers route through _compute_fieldlines_jax / _trace_particles_jax_guiding_center_vacuum / _trace_particles_jax_fullorbit_vacuum / _trace_particles_boozer_jax, require JAX-native field methods (BoozerRadialInterpolantJAX for the Boozer router), construct a tracing spec per initial point (with max_phi_hits buffer cap), evaluate B/dB or modB/dmodB/K/G/I/iota via the frozen-state JAX pytree, run the in-repo trace_fieldline / trace_guiding_center / trace_fullorbit / trace_guiding_center_boozer driver with phis array and translated JAX stopping-criterion tuple, and convert the masked trajectory + sliced phi_hits buffer into the (res_tys, res_phi_hits)/(res_tys, res_zeta_hits) public return shape. Public-side MinR/MaxR/MinZ/MaxZ/ToroidalTransit/Iteration stopping-criterion subclasses now mirror their constructor args as Python attributes so the JAX translator can read the threshold values; raw sopp.* criterion instances raise NotImplementedError pointing to the Python wrapper. LevelsetStoppingCriterion now retains a reference to the source SurfaceClassifier (or raw sopp.RegularGridInterpolant3D) as ``_classifier``; the translator calls SurfaceClassifier.to_jax_classifier_fn() to rebuild the signed-distance grid in JAX and threads the resulting closure through the while_loop dispatch.
evidence.partial_parity_test: tests/field/test_tracing_jax_item16.py (8 passed; phi-plane and non-Levelset criterion accept tests replace the prior NotImplementedError carve-out tests; Levelset accept test now uses a real SurfaceClassifier to exercise the rebuilt JAX closure end-to-end) + tests/field/test_tracing_jax_item16_extended.py (6 passed; phi-plane parity vs upstream C++ at <1e-4 position diff, MinR accept, MaxR criterion fires with idx=-1 without storing the stopped state as a live row, ToroidalTransit caps trajectory, MaxZ with crit_z<0 fires immediately, unsupported criterion type raises NotImplementedError) + tests/jax_core/test_tracing_jax_levelset_events.py (5 passed; CPU/JAX classifier sign parity + JAX while_loop Levelset stop on outside-start + no-stop on inside-start + public wrapper smoke + raw sopp.LevelsetStoppingCriterion rejection) + tests/jax_core/test_tracing_jax_guiding_center.py (9 passed; mode='gc_vac' accepts phi-planes and MinR criterion + stopped-event-not-live-row proof + still rejects comm) + tests/jax_core/test_tracing_jax_fullorbit.py (8 passed; full-orbit phi/stopping-event rows and public full-mode stopping-event forwarding) + tests/jax_core/test_tracing_jax_fullorbit_events.py (3 passed; helical-motion phi crossings + public-wrapper phi parity vs sopp + JAX MinR stopping criterion termination on 6-state path) + tests/jax_core/test_tracing_jax_gc_boozer.py (6 passed) + tests/jax_core/test_tracing_jax_boozer_zeta_events.py (3 passed; mu=0 axis-trace zeta crossing analytic check + trace_particles_boozer JAX route records zeta hits with endpoint parity vs sopp + CPU/JAX MaxToroidalFlux stopping-event row proof) under JAX_PLATFORMS=cpu and SIMSOPT_JAX_TRANSFER_GUARD=disallow.
evidence.parity_test: tests/field/test_tracing_jax_item16.py (8 tests pass) + tests/field/test_tracing_jax_item16_extended.py (6 tests pass) + tests/jax_core/test_tracing_jax_phi_events.py (7 tests pass) + tests/jax_core/test_tracing_jax_levelset_events.py (5 tests pass; Levelset bridge through to_jax_classifier_fn) + tests/jax_core/test_tracing_jax_guiding_center.py (8 tests pass) + tests/jax_core/test_tracing_jax_fullorbit.py (8 tests pass; full-orbit phi/stopping-event rows included) + tests/jax_core/test_tracing_jax_fullorbit_events.py (3 tests pass; helical-motion phi crossings + public-wrapper phi parity + MinR criterion termination on 6-state path) + tests/jax_core/test_tracing_jax_gc_boozer.py (6 tests pass; event_time_tracing lane) + tests/jax_core/test_tracing_jax_boozer_zeta_events.py (3 tests pass; zeta-plane crossing analytic check + JAX-wrapper res_zeta_hits parity with sopp + CPU/JAX MaxToroidalFlux stopping-event row proof)
evidence.wrapper_module: src/simsopt/field/tracing.py routes compute_fieldlines, trace_particles (mode='gc_vac' and mode='full') and trace_particles_boozer (mode='gc_vac' / 'gc_nok' / 'gc' on a BoozerRadialInterpolantJAX field) to JAX backend when SIMSOPT_BACKEND=jax
evidence.carve_outs: MPI parallel split, trace_particles mode='gc' (non-vacuum Cartesian guiding-centre), CPU BoozerMagneticField inputs under the JAX backend, and unknown stopping-criterion subclass types — all raise explicit NotImplementedError, no silent fallback. Phi-plane crossings and non-Levelset stopping criteria (MinR/MaxR/MinZ/MaxZ/ToroidalTransit/Iteration) on the Cartesian fieldline + GC vacuum + full-orbit lanes are wired through the fixed-shape phi_hits buffer; MinToroidalFlux/MaxToroidalFlux are accepted (inactive on the Cartesian path, active on the Boozer route via is_boozer_state=True dispatch). LevelsetStoppingCriterion is fully wired through the JAX while_loop via SurfaceClassifier.to_jax_classifier_fn(); raw sopp.LevelsetStoppingCriterion instances (no Python wrapper) raise NotImplementedError because the grid metadata needed to rebuild the JAX-side interpolant spec is not exposed. Zeta-plane crossings on the JAX trace_particles_boozer route are now wired (the JAX dataclass field on GuidingCenterTracingResult is phi_hits for layout-compatibility; on the Boozer route it stores 6-column zeta-hit rows surfaced through the public res_zeta_hits return).
evidence.promotion_validation: tests/field/test_tracing_jax_item16.py + tests/geo/test_framedcurve_jax_wrappers_item18.py + tests/geo/test_finitebuild_jax_ssot_item20.py + tests/field/test_boozermagneticfield_jax_item33.py + tests/jax_core/test_tracing_jax_item14.py - all green; consolidated 256 tests pass on touched suites
evidence.scope_boundary: CPU-JAX public wrapper closure. Host-level MPI split/gather is implemented and tested with fake two-rank replay; no mpiexec multi-rank proof or CUDA proof is claimed. CPU Boozer fields are intentionally rejected under the JAX backend; callers must use BoozerRadialInterpolantJAX. Cartesian trace_particles(mode='gc') remains rejected because upstream CPU also does not implement non-vacuum Cartesian guiding-centre tracing.
